# reset

w 56 0F 01

#Inner Setting Export Result From GUI setting
w 56 1B BD
w 56 23 1A
w 56 04 9E
w 56 05 02
w 56 76 0F
w 56 82 00 00 00 F0
w 56 85 00 00 00 06
w 56 86 00 00 30 06
w 56 94 00 00 00 11
w 56 95 40 00 32 10
w 56 96 10 00 00 6C
w 56 B0 00 00 07 FF
w 56 19 15
w 56 10 77

# WARNING: KEEP THESE VALUES. See: QUASARSYS-1172
w 56 11 00
w 56 12 06
w 56 13 0C
w 56 14 12

w 56 8E 01 00 00
w 56 8F 7F F8 00
w 56 90 01 00 00
w 56 91 7F F0 00
w 56 92 01 00 00
w 56 93 7F F0 00
w 56 6D 01 00 00
w 56 6E 7F F9 00
w 56 79 00 00 00 F0
w 56 8B 30
w 56 8C 18
w 56 00 1A
w 56 15 10
w 56 1E 07
w 56 20 80
w 56 5F 27 00 00 27
w 56 16 06
w 56 21 00
w 56 1F 03

#mute and enable I2C access to EQ
w 56 06 08
w 56 22 30
w 56 03 5F

# Export the EQ DRC setting From GUI setting

# EQ & SPEQ enable control
w 56 25 FF
w 56 26 FF
w 56 27 FF
w 56 28 FF
w 56 29 F0
w 56 2A 00
w 56 2B 00

# EQ Bqs Parameter
w 56 2F FC 02 4A 03 07 FD A9 64 03 FE D7 D8 F8 02 50 50 03 FE D7 D8
w 56 30 FC 02 37 B8 07 FD BB AE 03 FE E0 FE F8 02 3E 05 03 FE E0 FE
w 56 31 FC 09 FF CD 07 F5 F3 A5 09 FF 95 1C EC 00 D5 C8 09 FF 95 1C
w 56 32 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 04 00 00 00
w 56 33 FC 0E 6F 69 07 F0 87 13 03 F6 80 00 F8 0F 78 ED 03 FB 10 97
w 56 34 FC 43 CC D2 07 B9 E0 BB 00 00 94 9D 00 01 29 3A 00 00 94 9D
w 56 35 FC 43 CC D2 07 B9 E0 BB 00 00 94 9D 00 01 29 3A 00 00 94 9D
w 56 36 FC 13 5D D1 07 EC 8F 63 03 EE A0 07 F8 13 70 9D 03 FE 02 29
w 56 37 FC 07 F4 35 07 F7 A7 20 03 F5 B8 50 F8 08 58 E1 04 02 53 7B
w 56 38 FC 06 9D 40 07 F9 5D 44 03 FC B0 01 F8 06 9F FE 03 FC B0 01
w 56 39 FC 06 9D 40 07 F9 5D 44 03 FC B0 01 F8 06 9F FE 03 FC B0 01

# SPEQ Parameter

# DRC Bqs Parameter
w 56 47 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 04 00 00 00
w 56 48 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 04 00 00 00
w 56 49 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 04 00 00 00

w 56 4B 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 04 00 00 00
w 56 4C 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 04 00 00 00
w 56 4D 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 04 00 00 00
w 56 4E 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 04 00 00 00
w 56 4F 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 04 00 00 00
w 56 50 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 04 00 00 00
w 56 51 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 04 00 00 00
w 56 52 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 04 00 00 00

# Loudnessgain
w 56 57 40 00 00 00 40 00 00 00 40 00 00 00

# DRC Settings
w 56 61 3C C2 9C
w 56 62 00 44 44
w 56 63 00 01 23
w 56 64 3C C2 F4
w 56 65 00 44 44
w 56 66 00 01 23
w 56 67 3C C2 DC
w 56 68 00 44 44
w 56 69 00 01 23
w 56 6A 00 02 F4
w 56 6B 00 44 44
w 56 6C 00 01 23
w 56 60 00 00 08 01

# checksum
w 56 9A 13 F3 38 5A
w 56 9B 40 00 00 00
w 56 9C 13 F3 38 5A

#Disable I2C access to EQ
w 56 03 5E

# Set Master Volume and Channel Volume
w 56 07 FF
w 56 08 9F
w 56 09 9F
w 56 0B 00

# Set Prescaler and Postscaler
w 56 2C E5 55
w 56 2D 7F FF

# Set Monitor 0
w 56 17 00

# Unmute
w 56 22 00
w 56 06 00
